twistEngineModels.no decomp: whole-domino centroid per placement (un-reduced; the 936 artifact). pass = Tw==0.
twistEngineModels.jump decomp: one kept strand, twin cells as holes, short-side folds = 3-jumps (Model B). pass = Tw==0.
twistEngineModels.normal decomp: filled: kept strand with 3-jumps filled by collinear midpoints (== jump). pass = Tw==0.
twistEngineModels.partial decomp: lead's variable-width: 1-unit by default, 2-unit centroid at short-side folds. 3-way class flat/overhang/twisted/mixed; pass = flat or overhang (overhang = atan(1/2) residual = one end sticks out but the fold closes).
